raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I visited XXXX to have blood drawn. The tests were covered under my health insurance. The woman at the front desk told me that she would need to take a credit card for anything that the insurance did not cover. ( The insurance covers it all ) She then accidentally charged my card XXXX rather than keeping it for their records. She then told me that she was refunding my card. I noticed this charge had not been refunded as stated on XXXX. I contacted XXXX who wanted my credit card statements. I told them I was uncomfortable with that. I instead contacted Barclays who holds the Jet Blue card improperly charged. There was a communication barrier but I explained that the charge was in error, and that my insurance had paid... I even uploaded them the insurance companies statment. Now i find out with nobody contacting me or anything that they closed my dispute. This should be a simple issue. I did not authorize a charge, and the woman at XXXX did not properly refund the card. Instead, I am many hours into this now awaiting a callback from a manager at Barclays that could come sometime in the next days
